name: Alpha Complex Reactor Audit
summary: A routine audit that spirals into sabotage, clone churn, and contradictory orders.

locations.name: Briefing Room RED-7
locations.description: The Computer assigns impossible objectives and warns against knowing too much.

locations.name: R&D Checkout Bay
locations.description: Experimental hardware is issued with mutually incompatible instructions.

locations.name: Reactor Corridor 3
locations.description: Security checkpoints, false alarms, and hidden sabotage signs.

locations.name: Reactor Core Platform
locations.description: Critical failures trigger countdown events and loyalty tests.

locations.name: Debrief Chamber
locations.description: Survivors are rewarded, blamed, and recycled.

npcs.name: Patch-O-RND
npcs.description: Insists every malfunction is user error.

npcs.name: PLC Guard Pair
npcs.description: Follows protocol until bribed by authority cues.

clues.name: Forged Work Order
clues.description: Maintenance order signed with wrong clearance code.

clues.name: Overclocked Coolant Settings
clues.description: Controller values exceed safe operational limits.

clues.name: Broken Security Seal
clues.description: Prototype case opened before mission issuance.

events.description: The Computer issues three contradictory objectives.
R&D hands over an unstable diagnostic drone.
Sector alarm escalates to orange; IntSec demands immediate arrests.
Final technical/social resolution at the reactor controls.
Debrief allocates promotions and treason penalties.

success.outcome: Team gains commendation and temporary clearance favors.

partial.outcome: Reactor survives but scapegoats are executed.

failure.outcome: Facility loss; surviving clones reassigned for disciplinary service.

title: Alpha Complex Reactor Audit
